attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
 BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY
,BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE
,BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE
,COALESCE(GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY,-999) AS GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY
,DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT
,CASE WHEN RECORD_TYPE = 'CMS_GSP_TO_BE' THEN 3027
ELSE 3028 END AS TSS_ALLCTN_METHOD_TYPE_ID_INT
,COALESCE(DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG,'N') REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG
,COALESCE(DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG,'=') DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG
,COALESCE(CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG,'N') CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG
,SUM(COALESCE(TRADE_IN_AMOUNT,0.0)) TRADE_IN_AMOUNT
,SUM(COALESCE(TSS_BOOKINGS_AMOUNT,0.0)) DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT
,SUM(COALESCE(DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT,0.0)) DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT
,SUM(COALESCE(DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT,0.0)) DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT
,SUM(COALESCE(DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY,0.0)) DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY 
,SUM(COALESCE(DD_COMP_US_HOLD_NET_PRICE_AMT,0.0)) DD_COMP_US_HOLD_NET_PRICE_AMT
,SUM(COALESCE(DD_COMP_US_HOLD_LIST_PRICE_AMT,0.0)) DD_COMP_US_HOLD_LIST_PRICE_AMT
,SUM(COALESCE(DD_COMP_US_HOLD_COST_AMOUNT,0.0)) DD_COMP_US_HOLD_COST_AMOUNT
,SUM(COALESCE(DD_EXTENDED_HOLD_QUANTITY,0.0)) DD_EXTENDED_HOLD_QUANTITY
,SUM(COALESCE(DD_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT,0.0)) DD_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT
,SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
,SALES_REP_NUMBER
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)
,CURRENT_USER
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)
,CURRENT_USER
,PRODUCT_KEY AS SERVICE_ITEM_KEY
,SALES_MOTION_CD
,SUMMARY_QUOTE_FLG
,SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY
,SUM(COALESCE(DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT,0.0)) DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT
,SUM(COALESCE(DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT,0.0)) DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT
,DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
,SALES_ORDER_KEY
,DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD
,SUM(PID_PCT)
,DV_PRODUCT_KEY AS BUNDLE_PRODUCT_KEY
,CASE WHEN COALESCE(BP.RU_BK_ALLOCATED_SERVC_GROUP_ID,'UNK') LIKE 'CX%' THEN BP.BK_PRODUCT_ID ELSE BKGS.SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID END AS DV_CX_PRODUCT
,'N' AS TRUE_UP_FLG /* ADDED AS PART OF APRIL 10 FY22 RELEASE*/
,-999 AS DV_ATO_PRODUCT_KEY
,'UNKNOW' AS DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD
,,TRANSACTION_AI_FLG 
,AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD 
,TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME 
,SUM(COALESCE(FRST_YR_ANNUAL_USD_AMT,0.0)) FRST_YR_ANNUAL_USD_AMT
,SUM(COALESCE(MULTI_YEAR_USD_AMT,0.0)) MULTI_YEAR_USD_AMT
,SUM(COALESCE(NON_RECUR_ONE_TM_CR_USD_AMT,0.0)) NON_RECUR_ONE_TM_CR_USD_AMT
,SUM(COALESCE(FIRST_YEAR_CREDIT_USD_AMT,0.0)) FIRST_YEAR_CREDIT_USD_AMT
,SUM(COALESCE(MULTI_YEAR_CREDIT_USD_AMT,0.0)) MULTI_YEAR_CREDIT_USD_AMT 
FROM $$STGDB.WI_SERVICE_BOOKINGS_BY_PID_CMS BKGS
LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_PRODUCTS BP
ON BP.ITEM_KEY=BKGS.DV_PRODUCT_KEY
WHERE DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT IN (SEL FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_TSS_SRVC_BKGS_CNTRL_MNTH)
AND 1=2	
GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8,9,20,21,26,27,28,29,32,33,34,36,37,38,39,40,41,42
